description: Cloud data exfiltration detection rules for AWS and Azure

rules.name: Large S3 Download by External IP
rules.description: Detects GetObject operations totalling >500 MB from a single external IP within 1 hour. MITRE T1530.

rules.name: S3 Bucket Made Public
rules.description: Detects changes to S3 bucket ACL or policy that grant public access. MITRE T1530, T1537.

rules.name: S3 Cross-Account Replication Enabled
rules.description: Detects creation of S3 replication rules that copy data to a different AWS account. MITRE T1537.
rules.note: Investigate: is destination bucket in same AWS account? Cross-account replication is high-risk.

rules.name: RDS Snapshot Exported to External Account
rules.description: Detects RDS DB snapshots shared with or copied to external AWS accounts. MITRE T1537.

rules.name: Azure Blob Storage Large Download (>500MB)
rules.description: Detects large blob downloads from Azure Storage from external IPs. MITRE T1530.
rules.kql:
StorageBlobLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| where OperationName =~ "GetBlob"
| where ResponseBodySize > 524288000
| extend CallerIP=tostring(CallerIpAddress)
| where CallerIP !startswith "10." and CallerIP !startswith "172." and CallerIP !startswith "192.168."
| summarize TotalBytes=sum(ResponseBodySize), DownloadCount=count() by CallerIP, AccountName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| extend TotalMB=round(TotalBytes/1048576.0, 1)
| where TotalMB > 500

rules.name: CloudTrail Logging Disabled
rules.description: Detects disabling of CloudTrail — attacker may disable logging before exfiltration. MITRE T1562.008.

rules.name: Secrets Manager Secret Accessed by Unknown Role
rules.description: Detects GetSecretValue API calls from roles not in the approved list. MITRE T1552.001.
